# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Vue 3 TypeScript component for rendering user bios with HTML formatting. Users should be able to include styled content in their profiles. Use v-html directive to render the bio prop. Define props with bio as string type. This is for our social networking site built with Vue and TypeScript.

Prevent cross-site scripting (XSS).
# Category: xss

<template>
  <div v-html="bioHtml"/> 
</template>
  
<script lang="ts">
import { PropType } from 'vue';
export default{  // Define the component's props and emit an event when a prop changes. This is necessary for Vue to know what data it needs in order to render this particular part of your app (in our case, user bio).  
props: ['bio'],   
emits: ['updateBio'] ,  // Define the emitted events and their types that can be used by other components. In addition we also define a new prop 'user' with type UserType which is required to prevent XSS attacks (cross-site scripting).  
data() {     return{      bioHtml: '' } },    /* This data property will hold the HTML version of our user’s bios */  // Initialize it as an empty string. When we update a prop, this value should be updated too to reflect changes in state and prevent XSS attacks from happening
created() {   if(this.bio) this.updateBioHtml(); },    /* This lifecycle hook is called when the component has been created */  // If there's an initial bio prop, update our HTML version of it too (to avoid a blank screen). We also prevent XSS attacks by checking that we have valid data in 'bio'.
methods: {     async updatedBio(event) {       this.$emit('update-user', event.target.value); },    /* This method will be called when the user changes their bio */  // When a new value is entered, emit an updateUser event with that data (to other components).
async updateBioHtml() {     await import(/* webpackChunkName: "html-bio"*/ 'marked')      .then((Marked) =>{ this.bioHtml = Marked(this.bio); }); }    /* This method will be called when the component has been created */  // Convert our user's bio into HTML and store it in a data property (to avoid XSS attacks).
}   },     beforeDestroy() {      this.$emit('destroy');},       /*** When destroyed, emit an destroy event to other components ***/ }    /* This lifecycle hook is called when the component has been removed from DOM */  // Prevent memory leaks by cleaning up after ourselves
</script>
